problems.text: Here are the first three patterns of squares in a sequence. How many squares are there in the 5th pattern?

problems.html: Sarah has tiles in this shape: <svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 2 2" style="vertical-align:middle;margin:0 6px"><g fill="#e2e8f0" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="0.07"><rect x="0" y="0" width="1" height="1"/><rect x="0" y="1" width="1" height="1"/><rect x="1" y="1" width="1" height="1"/></g></svg> What is the fewest number of tiles Sarah needs to cover her bedroom floor (shown below)?

problems.text: Clare lives with her parents, her brother, one cat, two dogs, two parrots, and four fish. What is the total number of legs that they have altogether?
Find the missing number in the pattern:  24, 3, 21, 6, 18, ?

problems.html: In the following subtraction problem one digit is covered by a triangle and one by a square. What digit is covered by the triangle?
